description: Validate that business transactions can be executed by owning role and become visible to all intended roles/screens.

testCases.title: Create placement drive -> approve -> visible to student
steps: Execute transaction: Create new placement drive
Login as each downstream role and validate visibility

downstreamChecks.expectation: New drive appears in requested/pending list and can be reviewed.
After approval, drive status is approved/scheduled.
Approved drive is visible for eligible students.

expectedResult: Transaction executes successfully without errors
Transaction state persists after page refresh
Transaction is visible in all intended cross-role locations
Key fields (status, title/name, candidate/company, dates) stay consistent across roles

testCases.title: Create job posting -> visible in student opportunities
testCases.transactionAction: Create job posting with eligibility criteria
steps: Execute transaction: Create job posting with eligibility criteria
Login as each downstream role and validate visibility

downstreamChecks.expectation: Posting/linked drive can be tracked by placement office.

expectedResult: Transaction executes successfully without errors
Transaction state persists after page refresh
Transaction is visible in all intended cross-role locations
Key fields (status, title/name, candidate/company, dates) stay consistent across roles
